title: Auto-Thread
description: Auto-creates a comments thread on posts with images, videos, supported social posts, or direct Discord media links in watched channels.

fields.label: Watched channels
fields.help: Channels where the bot auto-creates a comments thread on qualifying posts.

fields.label: Delete non-qualifying posts
fields.help: When on, messages without images, videos, or supported post links are deleted and the author receives a DM asking them to use comments threads.

fields.label: Thread opener
fields.help: First message posted in the auto-created comments thread.

fields.label: Non-qualifying post DM
fields.help: Sent privately when a non-qualifying post is deleted. Tokens: {channel}, {message}
